clusters.title: Iran's soccer team cannot participate in the FIFA World Cup, Iranian minister says
clusters.dek: Iran is set to play three games in the U.S. this June. But amid the U.S.-Israel military campaign that has killed Iran's supreme leader, Iran's sports minister said the team would pull out.

articles.title: Iran's soccer team cannot participate in the FIFA World Cup, Iranian minister says
articles.summary: Iran is set to play three games in the U.S. this June. But amid the U.S.-Israel military campaign that has killed Iran's supreme leader, Iran's sports minister said the team would pull out.

articles.title: Iran's sports minister says country can't take part in World Cup because of U.S. attacks
articles.summary: Iran was expected to take part in the World Cup that will be held across North America in June, but Iranian Sports and Youth Minister Ahmad Donyamali told state television that his country's soccer team players are not s

clusters.title: Pentagon probe points to U.S. missile hitting Iranian school
clusters.dek: A military assessment suggests a U.S. Tomahawk cruise missile was responsible for at least 165 deaths at an Iranian girls' school, according to a U.S. official who was not authorized to speak publicly.

articles.title: Pentagon probe points to U.S. missile hitting Iranian school
articles.summary: A military assessment suggests a U.S. Tomahawk cruise missile was responsible for at least 165 deaths at an Iranian girls' school, according to a U.S. official who was not authorized to speak publicly.

articles.title: Iran war: More ships are hit and a probe points to the U.S. striking a girls school
articles.summary: Attacks and counterattacks continued throughout the Middle East Wednesday. Two cargo ships were struck in the Gulf, as some lawmakers in Washington pressed for answers on the war's rationale.

clusters.title: Countries agree to record release of emergency oil reserves as prices surge
clusters.dek: The G7 group of nations welcomes the idea of releasing oil in response to the surge in prices since the US-Israel war with Iran began

articles.title: Countries agree to record release of emergency oil reserves as prices surge
articles.summary: The G7 group of nations welcomes the idea of releasing oil in response to the surge in prices since the US-Israel war with Iran began

articles.title: Countries agree to a historic release of stockpiled oil to ease global disruption
articles.summary: Members of the International Energy Agency have announced a coordinated release of 400 million barrels of stockpiled oil in an attempt to counter the disruption in oil trade triggered by the Iran war.

clusters.title: French aid worker among three killed in drone strikes in rebel-held DR Congo city
clusters.dek: Witnesses say drone strikes hit a residential building frequently occupied by expatriates and aid workers in Goma.

articles.title: French aid worker among three killed in drone strikes in rebel-held DR Congo city
articles.summary: Witnesses say drone strikes hit a residential building frequently occupied by expatriates and aid workers in Goma.

articles.title: Rwanda-Backed Rebels Enter Congo's Safe-Haven City
articles.summary: Residents of Goma reported gunfire and shelling after rebels overran Congolese troops. U.N. officials estimated that more than one million displaced people were now inside the city.

clusters.title: North Korean leader Kim watches cruise missile tests with his daughter
clusters.dek: Images sent by state media Wednesday showed the two in a conference room watching the firing on a screen, but the report did not mention Kim's daughter.

articles.title: North Korean leader Kim watches cruise missile tests with his daughter
articles.summary: Images sent by state media Wednesday showed the two in a conference room watching the firing on a screen, but the report did not mention Kim's daughter.

clusters.title: Prosecutor says Rihanna, A$AP Rocky, 3 kids were home when woman charged with attempted murder fired
clusters.dek: Authorities say a Florida woman has been charged with attempted murder and other felonies over gunshots fired at Rihanna's Los Angeles home last weekend.

articles.title: Prosecutor says Rihanna, A$AP Rocky, 3 kids were home when woman charged with attempted murder fired
articles.summary: Authorities say a Florida woman has been charged with attempted murder and other felonies over gunshots fired at Rihanna's Los Angeles home last weekend.

clusters.title: Smartmatic says Trump's 'campaign of retribution' is driving criminal prosecution
clusters.dek: Voting technology firm Smartmatic asked a federal judge to dismiss a criminal money laundering indictment saying the case is political retaliation tied to President Donald Trump's baseless claims about the 2020 election.

articles.title: Smartmatic says Trump's 'campaign of retribution' is driving criminal prosecution
articles.summary: Voting technology firm Smartmatic asked a federal judge to dismiss a criminal money laundering indictment saying the case is political retaliation tied to President Donald Trump's baseless claims about the 2020 election.

clusters.title: Epstein's longtime accountant testifies on his wealth and business ties
clusters.dek: House lawmakers were digging into Jeffrey Epstein's sprawling financial portfolio Wednesday as a committee deposed his former accountant.

articles.title: Epstein's longtime accountant testifies on his wealth and business ties
articles.summary: House lawmakers were digging into Jeffrey Epstein's sprawling financial portfolio Wednesday as a committee deposed his former accountant.

clusters.title: How some states are reviving a push to tax the rich
clusters.dek: Advocates across the U.S. are hoping a growing unhappiness of wage and wealth inequalities that have increased coming out of the COVID-19 pandemic will help more states adopt policies involve the rich paying more in taxes.

articles.title: How some states are reviving a push to tax the rich

clusters.title: Most U.S. stocks fall as oil prices get back to rising
clusters.dek: Since the start of the Iran war, sharp moves for oil prices have triggered swings up and down for financial markets worldwide, sometimes by the hour.

articles.title: Most U.S. stocks fall as oil prices get back to rising
articles.summary: Since the start of the Iran war, sharp moves for oil prices have triggered swings up and down for financial markets worldwide, sometimes by the hour.
